title: Resolved pending scholarship disbursement after approval
description: A scholarship was approved on paper but remained unpaid because the disbursement batch missed one verified beneficiary list.
resolutionText: The beneficiary was added to the pending disbursement batch and the finance office confirmed the transfer release.

comments.author: Student
comments.body: Student requested confirmation that the financial record would be corrected without further manual visits.

comments.author: Finance Desk
comments.body: Follow-up review completed. The beneficiary was added to the pending disbursement batch and the finance office confirmed the transfer release.

title: Resolved scholarship bank account mapping rejection
description: Scholarship payment mapping failed because the beneficiary bank record contained a mismatched IFSC entry.
resolutionText: The bank details were corrected, the IFSC mismatch was cleared, and the scholarship mapping was revalidated.

comments.author: Student
comments.body: Student requested confirmation that the financial record would be corrected without further manual visits.

comments.author: Finance Desk
comments.body: Follow-up review completed. The bank details were corrected, the IFSC mismatch was cleared, and the scholarship mapping was revalidated.

title: Resolved scholarship status stuck under verification
description: A scholarship application remained under verification because one department document had not been digitally acknowledged.
resolutionText: The pending acknowledgement was recorded and the scholarship file advanced to the verified stage.

comments.author: Student
comments.body: Student requested confirmation that the financial record would be corrected without further manual visits.

comments.author: Finance Desk
comments.body: Follow-up review completed. The pending acknowledgement was recorded and the scholarship file advanced to the verified stage.

title: Resolved approved scholarship renewal not credited
description: A scholarship renewal was approved in the portal but the credited amount did not appear because the old bank mandate remained linked.
resolutionText: Finance updated the active bank mandate and released the scholarship renewal payment.

comments.author: Student
comments.body: Student requested confirmation that the financial record would be corrected without further manual visits.

comments.author: Finance Desk
comments.body: Follow-up review completed. Finance updated the active bank mandate and released the scholarship renewal payment.

title: Resolved income certificate mismatch in scholarship file
description: A scholarship renewal was held because the uploaded income certificate metadata did not match the application record.
resolutionText: The document metadata was corrected and the scholarship file was released from mismatch review.

comments.author: Student
comments.body: Student requested confirmation that the financial record would be corrected without further manual visits.

comments.author: Finance Desk
comments.body: Follow-up review completed. The document metadata was corrected and the scholarship file was released from mismatch review.

title: Resolved pending caution deposit refund
description: A caution deposit refund remained pending because the clearance memo was approved offline but not uploaded to the refund queue.
resolutionText: The clearance memo was uploaded to the refund queue and finance initiated the caution deposit refund.

comments.author: Student
comments.body: Student requested confirmation that the financial record would be corrected without further manual visits.

comments.author: Finance Desk
comments.body: Follow-up review completed. The clearance memo was uploaded to the refund queue and finance initiated the caution deposit refund.

title: Resolved refund for duplicate institutional payment
description: A duplicate institutional payment needed refund processing after the ledger showed both gateway attempts as settled.
resolutionText: Finance marked the duplicate transaction for reversal and generated the refund reference for the student.

comments.author: Student
comments.body: Student requested confirmation that the financial record would be corrected without further manual visits.

comments.author: Finance Desk
comments.body: Follow-up review completed. Finance marked the duplicate transaction for reversal and generated the refund reference for the student.

title: Resolved event cancellation refund delay
description: Refunds for a cancelled event were delayed because the organizer settlement sheet reached finance after the original payout window.
resolutionText: The organizer settlement sheet was processed and finance released the event cancellation refunds.

comments.author: Student
comments.body: Student requested confirmation that the financial record would be corrected without further manual visits.

comments.author: Finance Desk
comments.body: Follow-up review completed. The organizer settlement sheet was processed and finance released the event cancellation refunds.

title: Resolved hostel mess advance refund delay
description: A mess advance refund was held because the hostel balance transfer file did not include the student's final reconciliation entry.
resolutionText: The missing reconciliation entry was added and the mess advance refund was released.

comments.author: Student
comments.body: Student requested confirmation that the financial record would be corrected without further manual visits.

comments.author: Finance Desk
comments.body: Follow-up review completed. The missing reconciliation entry was added and the mess advance refund was released.

title: Resolved library deposit refund pending clearance sync
description: A library deposit refund did not start because the library clearance flag was not synced to the central refund dashboard.
resolutionText: The library clearance sync was corrected and the refund workflow moved to payment processing.

comments.author: Student
comments.body: Student requested confirmation that the financial record would be corrected without further manual visits.

comments.author: Finance Desk
comments.body: Follow-up review completed. The library clearance sync was corrected and the refund workflow moved to payment processing.

title: Resolved dispute over hostel noise complaint record
description: A student challenged a hostel noise complaint because the incident timing overlapped with an approved floor meeting.
resolutionText: The warden reviewed the incident log, matched it with the approved floor meeting, and corrected the complaint record.

comments.author: Student
comments.body: Student requested cautious handling and confirmation that the safety concern would be reviewed promptly.

comments.author: Security Office
comments.body: Follow-up review completed. The warden reviewed the incident log, matched it with the approved floor meeting, and corrected the complaint record.

title: Resolved bicycle parking penalty appeal
description: A bicycle parking penalty was contested because the marked restricted area signage was temporarily removed during repainting.
resolutionText: Security reviewed the location status, waived the penalty, and restored clear restriction signage in the parking area.

comments.author: Student
comments.body: Student requested cautious handling and confirmation that the safety concern would be reviewed promptly.

comments.author: Security Office
comments.body: Follow-up review completed. Security reviewed the location status, waived the penalty, and restored clear restriction signage in the parking area.

title: Resolved appeal on classroom conduct warning

resolutionText: The department reviewed seating and invigilator notes and revised the conduct warning entry accordingly.

comments.author: Student
comments.body: Student requested cautious handling and confirmation that the safety concern would be reviewed promptly.

comments.body: Follow-up review completed. The department reviewed seating and invigilator notes and revised the conduct warning entry accordingly.

title: Resolved clarification request on mess queue misconduct report

comments.body: Student requested cautious handling and confirmation that the safety concern would be reviewed promptly.

title: Resolved security escalation for misplaced ID card misuse risk

comments.author: Student
comments.body: Student requested cautious handling and confirmation that the safety concern would be reviewed promptly.

comments.author: Security Office
comments.body: Follow-up review completed. Security blocked the card immediately, reviewed access logs, and initiated a replacement ID process.

title: Resolved security complaint on non-functional path lighting
description: A poorly lit hostel pathway raised safety concerns because two consecutive street lights had failed after a power surge.
resolutionText: Electrical maintenance replaced the failed lighting components and security increased patrol checks until restoration.

comments.body: Student requested cautious handling and confirmation that the safety concern would be reviewed promptly.

comments.author: Security Office
comments.body: Follow-up review completed. Electrical maintenance replaced the failed lighting components and security increased patrol checks until restoration.

title: Resolved confidential escalation on repeated inappropriate comments
